ButtonProps.signature: interface ButtonProps extends React.ButtonHTMLAttributes<HTMLButtonElement>, VariantProps<typeof buttonVariants> { asChild?: boolean }
ButtonProps.description: Props for the Button component. Extends HTML button attributes with variant and size props from CVA.

ButtonVariants.description: Type for Button variant props: variant ('default' | 'destructive' | 'outline' | 'secondary' | 'ghost' | 'link') and size ('default' | 'sm' | 'lg' | 'icon').

BadgeVariants.description: Type for Badge variant props: variant ('default' | 'secondary' | 'outline' | 'destructive').

CardProps.description: Props for the Card component. Extends standard HTML div attributes.

DialogProps.signature: interface DialogProps extends Radix.DialogProps { open?: boolean; onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void; defaultOpen?: boolean; modal?: boolean }
DialogProps.description: Props for the Dialog component. Controls open state and modality.

DialogContentProps.signature: interface DialogContentProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof DialogPrimitive.Content> { className?: string }
DialogContentProps.description: Props for DialogContent. Accepts className and Radix Dialog.Content props.

FormFieldProps.signature: interface FormFieldProps<TFieldValues extends FieldValues, TName extends FieldPath<TFieldValues>> { control: Control<TFieldValues>; name: TName; render: ({ field, fieldState, formState }) => React.ReactElement }
FormFieldProps.description: Props for FormField component. Connects to react-hook-form via control, name, and render props.

InputProps.description: Props for the Input component. Extends native HTML input attributes.

TextareaProps.description: Props for the Textarea component. Extends native HTML textarea attributes.

SelectProps.signature: interface SelectProps extends Radix.SelectProps { value?: string; onValueChange?: (value: string) => void; defaultValue?: string; open?: boolean; onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void }
SelectProps.description: Props for the Select component. Built on Radix UI Select primitive.

ToastProps.signature: interface ToastProps { title?: string; description?: string; variant?: 'default' | 'destructive'; action?: ToastActionElement; open?: boolean; onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void }
ToastProps.description: Props for creating a toast notification.

ToastActionElement.description: The type for the action element in a toast notification. Must be a ToastAction component.

ToasterToast.signature: interface ToasterToast extends ToastProps { id: string; title?: string; description?: string; action?: ToastActionElement }
ToasterToast.description: Internal toast state type with unique id. Used by the toast store.

VariantProps.signature: type VariantProps<T extends (...args: any) => any> = Omit<OmitUndefined<Parameters<T>[0]>, 'class' | 'className'>
VariantProps.description: Extracts variant prop types from a CVA function. Used to type component props that accept CVA variants.

ClassValue.signature: type ClassValue = ClassArray | ClassDictionary | string | number | bigint | null | boolean | undefined
ClassValue.description: Type for values accepted by clsx. Supports strings, objects, arrays, and falsy values for conditional class names.

DataTableProps.signature: interface DataTableProps<TData, TValue> { columns: ColumnDef<TData, TValue>[]; data: TData[] }
DataTableProps.description: Props for the DataTable component pattern. Requires column definitions and data array.

ColumnDef.signature: interface ColumnDef<TData, TValue = unknown> { id?: string; accessorKey?: keyof TData & string; accessorFn?: (row: TData) => TValue; header?: string | HeaderContext<TData, TValue>; cell?: CellContext<TData, TValue>; footer?: string; enableSorting?: boolean; enableHiding?: boolean }
ColumnDef.description: Column definition for TanStack Table. Defines how each column accesses data, renders headers and cells.

UseFormFieldReturn.signature: interface UseFormFieldReturn { invalid: boolean; isDirty: boolean; isTouched: boolean; error?: FieldError; id: string; name: string; formItemId: string; formDescriptionId: string; formMessageId: string }
UseFormFieldReturn.description: Return type of useFormField hook. Provides form field state and accessibility IDs.

TooltipProviderProps.signature: interface TooltipProviderProps { children: React.ReactNode; delayDuration?: number; skipDelayDuration?: number; disableHoverableContent?: boolean }
TooltipProviderProps.description: Props for TooltipProvider. Controls tooltip delay and hover behavior globally.

AccordionProps.signature: interface AccordionProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof AccordionPrimitive.Root> { type: 'single' | 'multiple'; collapsible?: boolean; defaultValue?: string | string[]; value?: string | string[] }
AccordionProps.description: Props for the Accordion component. Type determines single or multiple selection mode.

AlertProps.description: Props for the Alert component with variant support.

AvatarProps.signature: interface AvatarProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof AvatarPrimitive.Root> { className?: string }

BadgeProps.signature: interface BadgeProps extends React.HTMLAttributes<HTMLDivElement>, VariantProps<typeof badgeVariants> {}
BadgeProps.description: Props for the Badge component with variant support.

CalendarProps.signature: interface CalendarProps extends Omit<DayPickerProps, 'className'> { className?: string; classNames?: Record<string, string> }
CalendarProps.description: Props for the Calendar component. Extends react-day-picker DayPickerProps.

CheckboxProps.signature: interface CheckboxProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof CheckboxPrimitive.Root> { checked?: boolean | 'indeterminate'; onCheckedChange?: (checked: boolean | 'indeterminate') => void }
CheckboxProps.description: Props for the Checkbox component. Supports boolean and indeterminate states.

SheetProps.signature: interface SheetProps extends Radix.DialogProps { open?: boolean; onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void; defaultOpen?: boolean }
SheetProps.description: Props for the Sheet component. Uses same API as Dialog.

SheetContentProps.signature: interface SheetContentProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SheetPrimitive.Content> { side?: 'top' | 'right' | 'bottom' | 'left'; className?: string }
SheetContentProps.description: Props for SheetContent. The 'side' prop controls which edge the sheet slides from.

TabsProps.signature: interface TabsProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof TabsPrimitive.Root> { defaultValue?: string; value?: string; onValueChange?: (value: string) => void; orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' }

ToggleProps.signature: interface ToggleProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof TogglePrimitive.Root>, VariantProps<typeof toggleVariants> { pressed?: boolean; onPressedChange?: (pressed: boolean) => void }
ToggleProps.description: Props for the Toggle component with variant support.

ProgressProps.signature: interface ProgressProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ProgressPrimitive.Root> { value?: number; max?: number }
ProgressProps.description: Props for the Progress component. Value is 0-100 by default.

SliderProps.signature: interface SliderProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SliderPrimitive.Root> { defaultValue?: number[]; value?: number[]; onValueChange?: (value: number[]) => void; min?: number; max?: number; step?: number }
SliderProps.description: Props for the Slider component. Value is an array for range support.

SwitchProps.signature: interface SwitchProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SwitchPrimitive.Root> { checked?: boolean; onCheckedChange?: (checked: boolean) => void; disabled?: boolean }

RadioGroupProps.signature: interface RadioGroupProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof RadioGroupPrimitive.Root> { value?: string; onValueChange?: (value: string) => void; defaultValue?: string }

LabelProps.signature: interface LabelProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof LabelPrimitive.Root>, VariantProps<typeof labelVariants> {}

ScrollAreaProps.signature: interface ScrollAreaProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof ScrollAreaPrimitive.Root> { className?: string; type?: 'auto' | 'always' | 'scroll' | 'hover' }
ScrollAreaProps.description: Props for the ScrollArea component. Type controls scrollbar visibility behavior.

SeparatorProps.signature: interface SeparatorProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof SeparatorPrimitive.Root> { orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical'; decorative?: boolean }

PopoverProps.signature: interface PopoverProps extends Radix.PopoverProps { open?: boolean; onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void; defaultOpen?: boolean; modal?: boolean }

DropdownMenuProps.signature: interface DropdownMenuProps extends Radix.DropdownMenuProps { open?: boolean; onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void; defaultOpen?: boolean; modal?: boolean }

NavigationMenuProps.signature: interface NavigationMenuProps extends React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root> { className?: string; orientation?: 'horizontal' | 'vertical' }
NavigationMenuProps.description: Props for the NavigationMenu component. Provides a navigation menu with animated sub-menus and indicators.

ContextMenuProps.signature: interface ContextMenuProps extends Radix.ContextMenuProps { onOpenChange?: (open: boolean) => void; modal?: boolean }
ContextMenuProps.description: Props for the ContextMenu component. Displays a menu triggered by right-click.

ComponentPropsWithoutRef.description: React utility type that extracts component props without the ref prop. Commonly used in shadcn/ui forwardRef components.
